details.message: reports/board/ directory does not exist. Expected top-level reports/ to contain both audit/ and board/ subdirectories.
reports/board/ directory is missing. Governance contract requires reports/audit/ and reports/board/ to exist. reports/audit/ is present; reports/board/ is absent.

Moltbot code/config found in active code paths (not documentation). Locations: moltbot/ directory (board.py, orchestrator.py, sentinel.py, promotion_discipline.py, memory_evolution.py, __init__.py), scripts/run_openclaw_molt_synthesis.py, scripts/run_molt_workflow.py, scripts/run_molt_intelligence_expansion.py, scripts/sre/run_sre_anomaly_scan.py, scripts/automations/run_governance_integrity_once.py. Per governance policy, Clawdbot/Moltbot should not be reintroduced in code or config.
